_comment: SAMPLE attribution file showing the schema. Real entries should be named '<image>.attribution.json' as a sibling to the image. This file is illustrative only — the corpus audit treats files starting with '_' as non-data.
notes: Example attribution. Replace fields with the real source when adding a real image. 'license' should be one of: public-domain, CC-BY-SA-3.0, CC-BY-4.0, CC0, fair-use-research, permitted-by-museum, owned-by-user. Avoid 'unknown' or 'all-rights-reserved' without a written permission record.
